title: Principal Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises!
